sn19.11:1.1: … "I saw a man with head submerged in a pit of dung … ."
sn19.11:1.2: "That being was an adulterer in this same Rājagaha…."[n.353] Spk: Having experienced contact with another man's wife, having enjoyed vile pleasure, sensual pleasure, he has been reborn in circumstances where, as a counterpart of that kamma, he experiences contact with filth and undergoes pain.
